findings.evidence: grep hit: `TauCeti/Topology/Homotopy/Covering.lean:7:public import TauCeti.AlgebraicTopology.FundamentalGroup`; the only use is the proof line `rw [FundamentalGroup.map_range_eq_bot_of_subsingleton f]` at line 77.
findings.fix: Make this a private `import` or prove the subsingleton range inclusion directly from `Subsingleton` so `Covering` only re-exports the Mathlib lifting API it actually extends.
findings.issue: `public import TauCeti.AlgebraicTopology.FundamentalGroup` exposes the trivial-source range lemmas to every importer of `TauCeti.Topology.Homotopy.Covering`, but no new public statement mentions those TauCeti declarations; they are only used to prove the subsingleton wrapper.

summary: The lifting theorems themselves are appropriately opaque and characterize the intended criterion, but the PR re-exports a proof-only TauCeti helper module as part of `Covering`'s public API.
